steps.title: Set off the appositive
steps.content: The phrase in this case, Herman Chernoff interrupts the sentence to identify the polymath. Because it is nonessential extra information, it needs matching punctuation on both sides before the sentence continues with who was not the first.

steps.title: Require matching marks
steps.content: Choice B opens with a colon and closes with a comma. Choice C opens with a dash and closes with a comma. Choice D lacks clear opening punctuation. Paired dashes correctly set off the interrupting phrase. The answer is A.
